svg.text: FDA 21 CFR 101.11 · Calorie display for chains with 20+ locations · pos_nutritional_info table
Chains with 20+ locations must display calorie counts on menus and menu boards (21 CFR 101.11). Voluntary for smaller chains.

Declared calorie counts must be based on lab analysis or reasonable basis (NLEA).
